description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a low-pitched, reddish-brown tiled roof and a white exterior. The front facade is accented by a paved driveway and walkway, flanked by three ornamental trees and bordered by flower beds. Large rectangular windows are distributed across the building, with a prominent bay window section on one side, adding architectural interest. The structure includes a small, partially enclosed rooftop area, likely for utility or access purposes. The overall design is compact and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and a modest footprint. The landscaping and paved areas suggest a suburban or residential neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a reddish-brown tiled roof, large windows, and a paved driveway bordered by ornamental trees and flower beds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, walkway, three ornamental trees, and flower beds along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the driveway, the side wall with windows, and the absence of trees on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bay window, the rooftop area, and the back landscaping with all three trees visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall with windows, the driveway, and two trees positioned near the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and a bay window on one facade
